content: We can reframe the core functionality of an Intrinsic Curiosity Module (ICM) as a self-tuning memory pruning gate for an active learning agent, where the prediction error that ICM uses to generate intrinsic reward also acts as a dynamic filter to retain only surprising, high-information state observations in the agent’s limited working memory. This creates a closed self-reinforcing loop where curiosity directly shapes which memories the agent keeps, rather than being just a reward signal for exploration.
